case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. LUXOR CAB CO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-21-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-06-2003

ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $164.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-21-2003 CONTINUED TO APR-18-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUN-20-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
